title: auth-service LDAP sync failing, cascading failures in payments-service and orders-service
description: Auth service is struggling to keep up with user login requests (60% fail rate). This seems to be impacting our payment processing as well - we're seeing intermittent 500s on the payments-service. Orders-service is also affected, with reports of delayed order processing.

title: Orders Service Unavailable
description: Orders not showing up on frontend, can't complete checkout. System seems hung up.

title: API Gateway Issue: 502 Errors and Routing Failures
description: Gateway-service is experiencing issues, getting 502 errors and routing failures. Tried restarting the service but still seeing errors. Need someone to investigate ASAP.

title: Auth Service Memory Leak?
description: Auth service is reporting high memory usage (~800MB) since the last deploy (approx. 13:55 UTC). CPU usage is stable, but we're seeing some latency issues. Trying to investigate and identify the root cause.

title: auth-service: False Positive Alert Storm
description: Auth service is receiving false positive alerts due to misconfigured threshold. The alert flood is causing excessive noise and impacting on-call fatigue.

title: auth-service regression: users unable to log in
description: Just deployed new auth-service code and now users are getting 'invalid credentials' errors when trying to log in. Trying to troubleshoot, but so far no obvious issues on the infrastructure side.

title: payments-service downtime due to auth-service degradation
description: Payments-service is down, and our initial investigation suggests it's linked to the auth-service struggles from earlier. We're still trying to determine the exact impact on orders-service.

title: Slow Orders Service
description: Orders taking ages to load, error saying 'timeout' when trying to checkout. Urgent help needed!

title: Auth-service not responding
description: Authentication service is down, users are unable to log in. Last checked at 14:00 UTC.

title: Payment processing issues with multiple gateways
description: We're experiencing payment processing delays across all gateways (Stripe, PayPal, Authorize.net). Payments are being queued but not processed. Gateway-service is showing high latency and errors.

title: orders-service slow
description: Orders service is taking way too long to respond, ~30s latency. We're getting complaints from customers about delayed order processing. Can you please look into this ASAP?

title: payments-service canary release failure
description: Just pushed new code to payments-service and it looks like the canary release didn't quite make it. Users are reporting issues with transaction processing.

title: OOM Kill in Payments Service?
description: Payments service was terminated by OOM killer at 13:58 UTC due to high memory usage (~1.5GB). We're trying to analyze the logs and identify the cause.

title: Orders Service CPU Spike
description: Orders service is reporting a sudden CPU spike (~80%) since 14:02 UTC. No obvious signs of increased traffic or queries. We're investigating.

title: gateway-service feature-flag misfire
description: Just flipped the 'new-payment-processing' flag on gateway-service and it looks like we got a false positive. Users are seeing incorrect payment amounts.

title: orders-service delays caused by auth-service issues
description: Orders-service is experiencing significant delays, and we suspect this is a direct result of the ongoing struggles with the auth-service. Payments-service appears to be handling transactions, but orders are being processed slowly.

title: Orders Service Slow and Erroring
description: Users reporting slow or erroring orders, unable to complete purchases. Trying to troubleshoot.

title: orders-service: Missing Monitoring Coverage
description: Orders service is missing critical monitoring coverage, making it difficult to detect potential issues. We need to add the required metrics and ensure proper alerting.

title: orders-service regression: order processing stalled
description: New orders-service code deployed and now we're seeing a backlog of unprocessed orders. Users are reporting delays.

title: Orders Timing Out
description: Checkout not completing due to timeouts on orders service. Looking for assistance ASAP.

title: Authorize.net payment timeout issues
description: Payments to Authorize.net are timing out, causing delayed processing. We've seen a spike in errors on the gateway-service. Possible timeout issue?

title: Gateway Service Issues: SSL Certificate Error
description: Got an alert that the SSL certificate for the gateway service has expired. Trying to renew it but getting errors. Need help sorting this out ASAP.

title: auth-service slow
description: Auth service is experiencing slowness, causing issues for users trying to login. DB queries are taking ~10x longer than usual. Can you investigate?

title: auth-service rollback required (old code still broken)
description: Rollbacked to previous auth-service version, but it looks like the old code is still causing issues. Users are getting the same errors.

title: Gateway Service Memory Leak Detected
description: Memory usage for gateway service has increased to ~900MB since the last deploy. No CPU spikes or other issues observed.

title: gateway-service error rate increasing due to auth-service degradation
description: Gateway-service is reporting an unusual spike in errors (40% failure rate). We're investigating if this is a direct result of the ongoing auth-service issues.

title: gateway-service service regression (network latency issue?)
description: Users reporting increased latency with gateway-service. We're investigating if it's related to a recent network infrastructure change.

title: Orders Service Slow, Possibly Due to Payments Issue?
description: Orders taking a while to process, think it might be related to the payments service being slow. Any ideas?

title: User authentication failure
description: We're experiencing issues with users attempting to log in. It appears the auth-service is not functioning correctly.

title: Payment errors on orders-service with Stripe
